title: Josh Griffin
description: English professional rugby league & union footballer
extract:
Josh Griffin (born 9 May 1990) is an English former rugby league footballer who last played as a second-row forward for the York Knights in the Super League.
He has previously played for Hull FC, Huddersfield Giants, Castleford Tigers, Wakefield Trinity and the Salford Red Devils in the Super League. He spent time at the Batley Bulldogs, on loan from Huddersfield and also on permanent deal at Batley in the Championship. Earlier in his career he played as a centre and winger.
Between 2012 and 2014 he played professional rugby union as a winger for Leeds Carnegie in the RFU Championship.
